Fields.Name: Sound Number
Fields.Description: Sound No to play (sound type is fixed to a)

Fields.Name: Expand Range
Fields.Description: Extended distance of playback judgment area

Fields.Name: Follow Speed
Fields.Description: Follow-up speed (fixed speed) to the target position of the actual sound source

Fields.Name: Follow Rate
Fields.Description: Follow-up speed (difference ratio) to the target position of the actual sound source
